query:
-- Add missing column to users table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN onboardingCompleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL;

-- Create user_profiles table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_profiles (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  coreValues JSON,
  lifeGoals JSON,
  beliefs JSON,
  currentChallenges TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Create daily_check_ins table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS daily_check_ins (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  mood INT,
  energy INT,
  stress INT,
  reflection TEXT,
  aiResponse LONGTEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Create journal_entries table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS journal_entries (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255),
  content LONGTEXT,
  aiPerspective LONGTEXT,
  tags JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Create life_domain_scores table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS life_domain_scores (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  domain VARCHAR(100),
  score INT DEFAULT 5,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Create habits table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS habits (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  domain VARCHAR(100),
  name VARCHAR(255),
  description TEXT,
  frequency VARCHAR(50),
  currentStreak INT DEFAULT 0,
  longestStreak INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Create habit_completions table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS habit_completions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  habitId INT NOT NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (habitId) REFERENCES habits(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Create weekly_insights table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS weekly_insights (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  weekStart DATE,
  patterns JSON,
  insights LONGTEXT,
  actionableSteps JSON,
  emotionalMaturityScore INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Create growth_milestones table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS growth_milestones (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255),
  description TEXT,
  category VARCHAR(100),
  emotionalMaturityLevel INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
